items.title_zh: Anthropic 发布 Claude Opus 4.6，主打更强的智能体编码能力
items.title_en: Anthropic releases Claude Opus 4.6 with stronger agentic coding
items.summary_zh: 新模型在长时间多步骤任务与代码生成上明显提升，强调更稳定的工具调用与更长的上下文处理。
items.summary_en: The new model improves on long-horizon multi-step tasks and code generation, emphasizing more reliable tool use and longer context handling.
items.why_zh: 智能体编码正成为各大实验室竞争焦点，直接影响开发者日常工具链。
items.why_en: Agentic coding is becoming the key battleground among labs, directly shaping developers' daily toolchains.

items.title_zh: OpenAI 推出面向企业的实时多模态助手
items.title_en: OpenAI launches a realtime multimodal assistant for enterprises
items.summary_zh: 该助手支持语音、图像与屏幕共享的实时交互，并提供细粒度的权限与审计能力。
items.summary_en: The assistant supports realtime voice, image and screen-sharing interactions with fine-grained permissions and auditing.
items.why_zh: 企业级合规与可控性，是 AI 助手大规模落地的关键门槛。
items.why_en: Enterprise compliance and controllability are key thresholds for large-scale assistant adoption.

items.title_zh: DeepSeek 开源新一代推理模型，训练成本大幅下降
items.title_en: DeepSeek open-sources a new reasoning model with much lower training cost
items.summary_zh: 团队公布了完整权重与训练细节，宣称在数学与代码推理上接近闭源旗舰水平。
items.summary_en: The team released full weights and training details, claiming math and code reasoning close to closed-source flagships.
items.why_zh: 低成本开源模型正在改变行业格局，降低中小团队的使用门槛。
items.why_en: Low-cost open models are reshaping the landscape and lowering barriers for smaller teams.

items.title_zh: 欧盟 AI 法案补充条款落地，明确通用模型透明度要求
items.title_en: EU AI Act supplementary rules clarify transparency for general-purpose models
items.summary_zh: 新规要求大型通用模型披露训练数据概要与能力边界，并设置分级合规义务。
items.summary_en: The rules require large general-purpose models to disclose training-data summaries and capability limits, with tiered obligations.
items.why_zh: 监管细化将直接影响模型厂商在欧洲的部署与文档披露方式。
items.why_en: Tighter rules will directly affect how vendors deploy and document models in Europe.

items.title_zh: AI 芯片初创公司完成新一轮数十亿美元融资
items.title_en: AI chip startup closes a new multi-billion-dollar funding round
items.summary_zh: 资金将用于扩大先进制程产能，并与多家云厂商达成长期供货协议。
items.summary_en: Proceeds will expand advanced-node capacity, alongside long-term supply deals with several cloud providers.
items.why_zh: 算力供给是 AI 发展的物理上限，芯片融资反映行业对未来需求的押注。
items.why_en: Compute supply is AI's physical ceiling; chip funding reflects bets on future demand.

items.title_zh: 新研究：检索增强可显著降低长文档问答中的幻觉
items.title_en: Study: retrieval augmentation sharply reduces hallucination in long-doc QA
items.summary_zh: 论文在多个基准上验证了结构化检索与引用约束对事实性的提升效果。
items.summary_en: The paper validates that structured retrieval and citation constraints improve factuality across benchmarks.
items.why_zh: 幻觉问题是 AI 可信落地的核心障碍，检索方案具备工程可行性。
items.why_en: Hallucination is a core obstacle to trustworthy AI; retrieval is engineering-practical.

items.title_zh: 知名科技高管离职创办 AI 智能体公司，引发人才流动讨论
items.title_en: Veteran tech exec leaves to found an AI agent startup, fueling talent-flow debate
items.summary_zh: 业内关注顶尖人才在大厂与初创之间的流动，以及对智能体方向的集中押注。
items.summary_en: The industry watches top talent moving between giants and startups, and concentrated bets on agents.
items.why_zh: 人才流向往往是技术路线热度的先行指标。
items.why_en: Talent flows are often a leading indicator of which technical directions are heating up.
